summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Monitoring Dashboard, SmartDownloadButton/Watermark integration, and Live Chat Widget human support escalation. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working. No bugs found.

components_verified: Generation Queue Status (Pending, Processing, Completed, Failed)
Recent Load Tests table with actual test data
admin_monitoring_dashboard.notes: Dashboard loads correctly with all metrics, historical load test data visible, UI responsive

components_verified: Test Type dropdown (API Endpoint Test, Generation Queue Test, etc.)
load_test_modal.notes: Modal opens and closes correctly, all form elements functional

watermark_service.notes: Admin users correctly get shouldApply=false, meaning no watermark on downloads

components_verified: Chat widget button visible on all pages
live_chat_widget.notes: Chat widget fully functional with context-aware responses

components_verified: Human Support modal opens from chat footer
Response time info '24 hours via email'
human_support_escalation.notes: Full escalation flow works - creates support tickets with ticketId

critical_code_review_comments: MonitoringDashboard component is well-structured with proper useEffect dependencies warnings (minor)
Watermark service correctly differentiates between free and paid users
LiveChatWidget has comprehensive auto-responses and human escalation flow
All monitoring APIs return structured JSON with success boolean
Load test history shows actual test data with metrics (success rate, latency, req/sec)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 123 completed comprehensive testing of Monitoring Dashboard and Watermark integration. All features working: Admin Monitoring Dashboard at /app/admin/monitoring shows system health (100%), queue status, load test history (5 tests visible), and scheduled tests. Load Test modal allows API/Generation/Concurrent/Stress test configuration. Watermark service returns shouldApply=false for admin users. Live Chat Widget opens from dashboard with bot responses and Human Support escalation flow creates support tickets. Frontend had a temporary build error that was resolved by restarting the service.
